column1: # Sample predictions for ARM A (plain agent, NO oma — no skills installed).
# Format: <case-id><TAB><predicted-skill>   ("none" = the arm picked no skill).
# Illustrative sample data, NOT a measured run.
# With no skills resident, arm A can never *trigger* a skill, so every pick is
# "none". This pins the baseline: triggering recall is 0 (it misses every case
# that should have used a skill) and its false-trigger rate is 0 (it cannot
# false-trigger what it does not have). The interesting question A answers is the
# workflow-adherence one (does the bare agent follow the workflow without the
# skill?) — that part is human-judged, see eval/README.md.
